channel.title: language-learning on Fei Li's Website
channel.description: Recent content in language-learning on Fei Li's Website

item.title: On Language Learning
item.description: I’m very interested in language learning. For a long time, I’ve been thinking about how one can effectively learn a new language. My native language is Chinese, which is often cited as one of the most difficult language to learn. We study English from kindergarten and I also spent 2 years in Italy, and now I’m casually learning Japanese. So even if I’m not a linguist by training, I think I’m still qualified to talk about this problem from my own experience.
